notes: v0.20.1 — SYNTHWAVE HUB BG. Main menu background swapped to the GRID PERSPECTIVE look you picked: deep blue → violet sky, segmented orange horizon sun, magenta vanishing-point grid rolling forward, faint distant stars. A small fighter streaks across the screen every 8–18 seconds with a glow trail and engine flare (cyan / magenta / gold randomly). Conductor pulses (rms + kick) subtly brighten the grid in time with the hub track.
